challenge_briefs: Challenge 1: Conversion-first landing refresh for a local service brand
Challenge 2: Brand motion system for an Austin creator collective
Challenge 3: Portfolio case-study narrative sprint with measurable KPI

public_private_delta.signal: Public confidence is ahead of private certainty.

learning_vs_conversion_mismatch.signal: Learning intensity outpaces direct revenue conversion loops.

financial_stress_triangulation.signal: Debt stress is an execution drag, not just a budgeting issue.

adhd_execution_constraints.signal: Execution improves when tasks are chunked and environment-scaffolded.
